summary: AI Event Cover Image Generation — Flutter frontend complete. EventFormCubit refactored to @freezed EventFormState (saveResult + coverGenerationResult). GetGenerateCoverUseCase + EventCoverService (Retrofit) + CoverGenerationDto + EventCoverRepositoryImpl implemented. CoverPreviewWidget created with 4 states (initial/loading/data/error). EventFormContent wires AI button. EventFormView BlocConsumer bridges cover data to FormImageCubit. 5 l10n keys added. dart analyze 0 errors. flutter test 5/5.

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.notes: All 16 artifacts created/modified: domain repository interface, use case, DTO, Retrofit service, repo impl, api_routes.dart, cubit refactor, event_form_view.dart, event_form_content.dart, cover_preview_widget.dart, form_image_cubit.dart, l10n keys, handoff doc

qualityGates.name: build_runner_clean
qualityGates.notes: dart run build_runner build --delete-conflicting-outputs succeeded; 127 outputs written; cover_generation_dto.g.dart and event_cover_service.g.dart generated; event_form_cubit.freezed.dart generated; injection.config.dart auto-updated with all new registrations

qualityGates.name: dart_analyze_zero_violations
qualityGates.notes: 0 errors, 0 warnings. 34 pre-existing info items in unrelated shared widgets (withOpacity deprecation, unnecessary_underscores) — not introduced by this iteration

qualityGates.name: tests_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.notes: flutter test 5/5 pass. Existing ProfileCubit tests and widget_test placeholder all green. Widget tests for CoverPreviewWidget (T-4-9) and unit tests for GetGenerateCoverUseCase (T-4-8) are QA phase deliverables

qualityGates.name: no_build_context_in_data_layer
qualityGates.notes: EventCoverRepositoryImpl uses hardcoded Spanish error string matching ARB value, no BuildContext

qualityGates.name: all_strings_via_l10n
qualityGates.notes: All 5 new Spanish strings in app_es.arb, used via context.l10n in CoverPreviewWidget and EventFormView

qualityGates.name: resultstate_pattern
qualityGates.notes: EventFormState uses two independent ResultState<T> fields; no boolean loading flags; covers initial/loading/data/error for both saveResult and coverGenerationResult

qualityGates.name: layer_separation
qualityGates.notes: Domain layer: no Flutter imports. Data layer: no BuildContext or widgets. Presentation: no DTOs exposed, no HTTP calls
